name: without the attached grounding the base requirements are still incomplete (proving the grounding is what closes it)
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","workload":"x","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public"}}' > p.json
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" --vision x --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>se.txt
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design s/technical-requirements.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'status=incomplete' e.txt && ! grep -q 'needs_grounding=0 ' e.txt && echo base-incomplete-without-grounding 1>&2
